_readme: Team branding registry. Add a school here and it's sellable — no code changes.
Set the active school per deployment with the TEAM env var (e.g. TEAM=acu).
Defaults to 'gridiron' (the unbranded house look) when TEAM is unset.
FIELDS
school      Full name, shown in the report header.
short       2-4 letters. Rendered INSIDE the tile mark as a monogram.
mascot      Shown under the wordmark.
primary     Official brand color. Used for the mark, light mode, and print.
accentDark  A BRIGHTENED primary for dark mode. Required — most college
brand colors (navy, maroon, deep purple) are near-invisible on a
near-black UI. This is the one field people get wrong.
onPrimary   Text color that sits on top of primary. #fff or #0a0d12.
secondary   Supporting color. Used for the secondary data series.
TRADEMARK — read before you sell this.
These are monograms (initials) in a school's colors, drawn in OUR tile mark.
We do NOT ship any school's actual logo, wordmark, or wildcat/mascot art.
Team names, logos and marks are trademarks of their schools. Colors alone
aren't protectable, but a logo is — if a school wants their real mark in the
product, get written permission from their licensing office first. Shipping
a scraped athletics logo in software you charge for is exactly the kind of
thing a university licensing office sends letters about.
